title: Create Aeronautics: Sable Mass Mod Compatibility
description: Compatibility pack that adds simulation properties for blocks from other mods.
body:
**This project adds (and modifies some) Sable properties to blocks from the mods listed below such as mass, bounciness etc. so that they feel right when used on simulated contraptions.**

#### Currently Supported Mods:
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) Mekanism
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Farmer's Delight
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) Supplementaries
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) Ars Nouveau
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushables) Plushables
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze) Bronze
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) Quark
- [↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-framed) Create: Framed


<details>
<summary>Altered Properties</summary>


By default, Sable marks all `#c:storage_blocks` as `super_heavy`. This works great for things like blocks of iron, diamond, steel, tumblestone but not as well for blocks like a sugar cube or straw bale.

This datapack makes *opinionated* decisions regarding these blocks, such as changing all hay/straw/rice type blocks to 1kpg, food crates from farmer's delight to 2kpg, ars nouveau's magebloom blocks to 1kpg and more.

There's a precedent to this thinking, as Sable itself changes some blocks in this tag group to have a lower mass than 4kpg, such as slime, copper, bone blocks, as well as Create's cardboard block, which is also part of c:storage_blocks.


</details>




### Feel free to suggest mods to include on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/vEZUkSxwR9)
